detail: Carpenter v. United States (2018) topic brief; 'hidden system' angle = your phone's location trail; score 92/100; R2. Capstone of EP6-8 surveillance trilogy (pays off Terry + Riley).
Owner content-approved the EP6-8 slate + scripts in chat; see episodes/_planning/EP6-8_HANDOFF.md sec.8. state -> approved.

Flagged a stray 6-3 AI-summary as wrong. Research QC: warn, non-blocking.

state -> script_verified. Owner content sign-off (APR-0001) re-bound to extended annotated hash. Codex may begin scenes/visuals.
